abort.already_configured: This SignalK server is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to SignalK server. Please check the URL and ensure the server is running.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please approve the access request in the SignalK Admin UI and try again.

choose_server.title: SignalK Server Detected
choose_server.description: A SignalK App was detected and is running on this system. Would you like to use it?

manual_url.title: SignalK Server URL
manual_url.description: Enter the base URL of your SignalK server.

auth.title: Authorize with SignalK
auth.description:
An access request has been sent to the SignalK server at {base_url}.

Please open the SignalK Admin UI → Security → Access Requests and **approve** the request from "Home Assistant SignalK Bridge".

Once approved, click Submit below.

prefix.title: Entity Prefix
prefix.description: Choose a prefix for entity IDs created by this integration. For example, with prefix 'signalk', a sensor for navigation.speedOverGround will have entity ID 'sensor.signalk_navigation_speedoverground'.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to SignalK server at the provided URL.

put_value.name: PUT value to SignalK
put_value.description: Send a PUT request to a SignalK path for vessel self. Use this to control devices (e.g. switch a light, set autopilot heading).

path.name: Path
path.description: The SignalK path to PUT the value to (e.g. 'electrical.switches.anchorLight.state').

value.name: Value
value.description: The value to set. Can be a number, string, boolean, or object.

post_delta.name: POST delta to SignalK
post_delta.description: Send a delta update for a SignalK path for vessel self. Use this to publish sensor data back to SignalK.

path.name: Path
path.description: The SignalK path to send the delta for (e.g. 'environment.inside.cabin.temperature').

value.name: Value
value.description: The value to send. Must be in SI units as per the SignalK specification.
